Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11083 0 0}Phew... It was pretty crowded in there, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 3 25 25}I wanted to give the punching machine a try, but the line's gotten so long I'd rather not...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Let's come back when it's less packed—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}Look! It's so cute! Plus... we might be able to get it in one shot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's been a while since the last time I've played. I may not look it, but I'm pretty good at these.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}H-Huh...? I couldn't grab it at all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11076 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 2 25 25}What!? No way! That's such bull! This has to be rigged or something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_003_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Want me to give it a shot?

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}If grabbing it doesn't work... I'll just have to slowly shift its position till it drops.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's kind of a pain, but slow and steady wins the race.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Same thing with sports, right? People who are dedicated to training become world-class athletes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh... Kinda went on a tangent there. Anyway, let's give this another shot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems motivated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11027 0 0}No, I don't! It's the friggin' claw! It's too weak![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 3 25 25}Ugh... Guess I just have to slowly adjust the position till it falls.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}In the end, slow and steady wins the race... even though it's a total drag.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it's the same with sports. People who are dedicated to training become world-class athletes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}...But that doesn't matter right now. All right, time to win this thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko looks serious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}If I just keep nudging it in the right direction... I should be able to knock it down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kind of a pain, but slow and steady wins the race, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Same thing with sports. People who are dedicated to training become world-class athletes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, time to put my game face on. I'll keep at it until I win this thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems really focused.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}Well, at least I got it in the end...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm so tired now... I've definitely run out of stamina and money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11071 0 0}Let's head back, {f 4 1}-kun. I need to eat dinner and recuperate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
